hooks.command: bash -c 'set -e; INPUT=$(cat); WORKTREE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .worktree_path); BASE_BRANCH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .base_branch); BRANCH_NAME="agent/$(basename "$WORKTREE_PATH")"; git -C "/Users/ali/git/personal/pharos" worktree add -B "$BRANCH_NAME" "$WORKTREE_PATH" "$BASE_BRANCH" >&2; echo "$WORKTREE_PATH"'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); WORKTREE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .worktree_path); BRANCH_NAME="agent/$(basename "$WORKTREE_PATH")"; git -C "/Users/ali/git/personal/pharos" worktree remove --force "$WORKTREE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; git -C "/Users/ali/git/personal/pharos" branch -D "$BRANCH_NAME" 2>/dev/null || true'
